zh.Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德
zh.Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clayton III於大約1282年出生在英國藍卡爾利藍德時，他的父親Ralph de Clayton23歲，母親Mrs. Sarah de Clayton22歲。他於1334年與Mary de Langtown在英國藍卡爾利藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1347年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰藍卡爾利藍德
zh-hans.Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clayton III于大约1282年出生在英国藍卡爾利藍德时，他的父亲Ralph de Clayton23岁，母亲Mrs. Sarah de Clayton22岁。他于1334年与Mary de Langtown在英国藍卡爾利藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1347年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clayton III was born about 1282, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, his father, Ralph de Clayton, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. Sarah de Clayton, was 22. He married Mary de Langtown in 1334, in Leyland, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 1347, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Clayton III est né environ 1282, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Clayton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Sarah de Clayton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Langtown en 1334, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 1347, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Clayton III um 1282 in Leyland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Clayton 23 und seine Mutter Mrs. Sarah de Clayton 22. Er hat 1334 in Leyland, Lancashire, England Mary de Langtown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 1347 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clayton III è nato il circa 1282 nel Leyland, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Clayton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Sarah de Clayton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Langtown nel 1334, nel Leyland, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1347, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Clayton IIIが約1282年にイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドで生まれた時，父Ralph de Claytonは23歳，母Mrs. Sarah de Claytonは22歳であった。1334年にイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドでMary de Langtownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1347年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clayton III(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Clayton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Sarah de Clayton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 Mary de Langtown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1347년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kin: Leyland, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clayton III nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Clayton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Sarah de Clayton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Langtown em 1334, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1347, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clayton III родился около 1282 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Clayton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Sarah de Clayton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Langtown в 1334 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 1347 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1282–after 1347: e tusa o le 1282–ina ua ma'ea le 1347

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Clayton III nació aproximadamente 1282, en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Clayton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs. Sarah de Clayton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mary de Langtown en 1334, en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de 1347, en su pueblo.
